name: Galle Fort
description: A historic Dutch fort with cobbled streets and ocean views.

highlights.name: Galle Clock Tower
highlights.description: A famous old clock tower within the fort.

highlights.name: Lighthouse
highlights.description: Iconic Galle lighthouse on the ramparts.

highlights.name: Dutch Hospital
highlights.description: Now a charming shopping and dining precinct.

events.title: Galle Fort Jazz Night
events.description: An evening of smooth jazz with top local artists.

name: Nelum Pokuna Theatre
description: Colombo’s modern event venue hosting concerts and performances.

events.title: Colombo Jazz Night
events.description: An evening of smooth jazz with top local artists.

name: Mirissa Beach
description: A palm-lined beach known for its surf and whale watching.

name: Kandy City Center
description: A popular gathering area for cultural parades and festivals.

events.title: Esala Perahera
events.description: Sri Lanka’s grandest procession with dancers, elephants, and fire acts.

name: Yala National Park Entrance
description: Entry to Sri Lanka’s famous wildlife park, home to leopards and elephants.

name: Colombo Art Gallery
description: An indoor venue for rotating art exhibitions and talks.

events.title: Contemporary Lankan Art
events.description: Exhibition of modern Sri Lankan painters and sculptors.
